<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}}
markdown
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Tiger also known as  Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].

It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: Heiin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần

<!--
==
* Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのえとら (hinoe-tora)
***Onyomi: へいかのとら (heika-no-tora)
***Onyomi: へいいん (heiin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần

-->
==Years of Yang Fire Tiger==
A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Heiin Years'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
*[[6]]
*[[66]]
*[[126]]
*[[186]]
*[[246]]
*[[306]]
*[[366]]
*[[426]]
*[[486]]
*[[546]]
*[[606]]
*[[666]]
*[[726]]
*[[786]]
*[[846]]
*[[906]]
*[[966]]
|
*[[1026]]
*[[1086]]
*[[1146]]
*[[1206]]
*[[1266]]
*[[1326]]
*[[1386]]
*[[1446]]
*[[1506]]
*[[1566]]
*[[1626]]
*[[1686]]
*[[1746]]
*[[1806]]
*[[1866]]
*[[1926]]
*[[1986]]
|
*[[2046]]
*[[:en:2106|2106]]
*[[:en:2166|2166]]
*[[2226]]
*[[2286]]
*[[:en:2346|2346]]
*[[:en:2406|2406]]
*[[:en:2466|2466]]
*[[2526]]
*[[2586]]
*[[2646]]
*[[2706]]
*[[2766]]
*[[2826]]
*[[2886]]
*[[:en:2946|2946]]
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Tiger==
The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].

==Days of Yang Fire Tiger==
=== Rekichū (Lower Section) ===
Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows:
* [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also ==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Pêng-chún]]
[[zh-yue:丙寅]]

{{translated page|ja|丙寅|qq=Yang Fire Tiger|version=98658211|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Bîng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Tigeri]]
[[de:Yang Fire Tiger]]

[[ja:丙寅]]
[[zh:丙寅]]
[[ko:병인]]
[[fr:Tigre de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Tiger]]
[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Tigreen]]
[[en:Fire Tiger]]
[[fr:Tigre de feushak]]
[[it:Bing-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Bính Dần]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[ar:Yang Fire Tiger]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yang Fire Tiger-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Bīng-ìng]]
[[hak:Piáng-yìm]]
[[nds:Füür-Tiger]]
[[za:Bingjyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]]
[[zh-yue:丙寅]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Bīng-ìng]]
[[hak:Piáng-yìm]]
[[nds:Füür-Tiger]]
[[za:Bingjyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]]
[[zh-yue:丙寅]]
{{wikidata link|Q767248}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
